ddls:
CREATE TABLE "runners" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "bib" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the runner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the runner */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the runner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the runner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "citizen" TEXT /* Citizenship status */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions the runner has */,
  "preferred_distance" TEXT /* Preferred race distance */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the runner registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 5K, 10K, half-marathon) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "5K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 5K */,
  "10K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 10K */,
  "15K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 15K */,
  "20K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 20K */,
  "half" TEXT /* Time taken to complete half-marathon */,
  "25K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 25K */,
  "30K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 30K */,
  "35K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 35K */,
  "40K" TEXT /* Time taken to complete 40K */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace of the runner */,
  "proj_time" TEXT /* Projected time of the runner */,
  "official_time" TEXT /* Official time of the runner */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the race */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Calories burned during the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain during the race */,
  "split_pace" TEXT /* Pace at different splits (e.g., 5K, 10K, etc.) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes from the runner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., Male 20-29) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the division */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the division was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the division was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_divisions" (
  "runner_division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner division */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the runner joined the division */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the runner left the division (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_divisions_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_divisions_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_events" (
  "runner_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner event */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the runner registered for the event */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_events_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runner */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the runner in the event */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position of the runner */,
  "division_position" INTEGER /* Position of the runner in their division */,
  "age_group_position" INTEGER /* Position of the runner in their age group */,
  "gender_position" INTEGER /* Position of the runner in their gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_runner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_id") REFERENCES runners ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., runner, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., pace, projected time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
